lang.name: lbl_pleaseSelectImageToInstall
lang.value: Por favor selecione a imagem para ser instalada:

lang.name: lbl_pleaseSelectFontToInstall
lang.value: Por favor selecione a fonte a ser instalada:

lang.name: lbl_pleaseSelectTxtFileToInstall
lang.value: Por favor selecione o ficheiro de texto para ser instalado:

lang.name: lbl_txtFileNotInstalled
lang.value: Impossível instalar o ficheiro de texto %s

lang.name: lbl_newWorkspaceWidth
lang.value: Nova largura da área de trabalho

lang.name: lbl_DateTimeHelp1
lang.value:
%a - Dia da semana abreviado
%A - Dia da semana completo
%b - Mês abreviado
%B - Mês completo
%c - Data e hora completos
%d - Dia do mês (1-31)
%H - Horas (24 horas)
%I - Horas (12 horas)
%j - Dia do ano (1-366)
%m - Mês (1-12)
%M - Minuto (0-59)

lang.name: lbl_DateTimeHelp2
lang.value:
%p - AM/PM para 12 horas
%S - Segundos (0-60)
%U - Número dia de sem. Domingo
%w - Dia da semana (0-6) desde segunda-feira
%W - Semana desde segunda-feira
%x - Data completa
%X - Hora do dia completa
%y - Ano (2 números)
%Y - Ano (3 números)
%Z - Zona horária
%% - Imprimir caracter %

lang.name: lbl_currentEncoderConstant
lang.value: Valor atual da constante do encoder

lang.name: lbl_currentConveyorSpeed
lang.value: Valor atual da velocidade da linha

lang.name: lbl_mustEdit
lang.value: Este objeto deve ser editado antes da impressão começar

lang.name: lbl_helpWelcome
lang.value: Manual do interface de utilizador Web EBS

lang.name: lbl_projectNotImported
lang.value: Não é possível importar o projeto %s

lang.name: lbl_import_conversionFromEBS250
lang.value: Converting EBS 250 project file to WWW Editor project file...

lang.name: lbl_resetCounterVF
lang.value: Warning: Some counters are set-up to be reset to theirs minimal or maximal value. For that counters changing the start value will be impossible. Such fields are marked grey

lang.name: lbl_printerNetwork_select
lang.value: Select printers you want add to your printer's network

lang.name: lbl_externalParamsFileNotFound
lang.value: External printing parameters file %s not found

lang.name: lbl_pleaseSelectPrintingParams
lang.value: Please select printing parameters to use with this project.

lang.name: btn_setPrintHeadDefault
lang.value: Definir parâmetros standard da cabeça de impressão

lang.name: msg_startPrintOperation
lang.value: Do you want to start printing?

lang.name: msg_deleteFolder
lang.value: Delete this folder and all data that it contains?

lang.name: msg_whatWouldYouLikeToDo
lang.value: What would you like to do?

lang.name: msg_settingsSavedSuccessfully
lang.value: Settings saved successfully.\nEditor should be reloaded at this moment.\nReload?

lang.name: msg_projectForDifferentPrintHead
lang.value: This project is not designed for current print head type.\nOpen this project anyway?

lang.name: msg_someoneLoggedIn
lang.value: User %s is currently logged in from IP address %s.\nDo you want to force login?

lang.name: msg_noFileSelected
lang.value: No file selected.\nPlease select file and try again.

lang.name: msg_noUserSelected
lang.value: No user selected.\nPlease select user and try again.

lang.name: msg_noPrinterSelected
lang.value: No printer selected.\nPlease select printer and try again.

lang.name: msg_ExternParamsFileNotSelected
lang.value: No file selected.\nPlease select external parameters file or switch to the local parameters.

lang.name: msg_printParamsSet
lang.value: Print parameters for the project are set successfully.

lang.name: msg_paramsOutOfRange
lang.value: Some parameters are out of range.

lang.name: msg_noPrintHeadDefinedInProject
lang.value: No print head type is defined for this project. Cannot determine several parameters i.e. print head height, resolution etc...

lang.name: msg_cantLoginBecauseToLowPriority
lang.value: User %s is currently logged in.\nYour priority is too low to use editor at this moment.

lang.name: msg_selectAtLeastOneGroup
lang.value: Please select at least one group.

lang.name: msg_loginInUse
lang.value: Selected login is in use.\nSelect another and try again.

lang.name: msg_groupInUse
lang.value: This group already exists.\nEnter different name and try again.

lang.name: msg_oldPasswordIsEmpty
lang.value: You must enter old password first.

lang.name: msg_oldPasswordIsBad
lang.value: Old password does not match current password.

lang.name: msg_allDataInObjectWillBeLost
lang.value: All data in this object will be lost.\nContinue anyway?

lang.name: msg_wrongParams
lang.value: In at least one section counter parameters are wrong (min > max).\nDo you want to reverse counting order?

lang.name: msg_updateExternFileParams
lang.value: Changes will affect all projects which use this external parameters file.\nContinue anyway ?

lang.name: msg_clearCacheReminder
lang.value: Different editor version was found.\nIt`s recommended to clear browser cache.

lang.name: msg_aboutWindow
lang.value:
EBS Web User Interface %s
Printer version: %s
System version: %s
PUI version: %s
 Printer manager version: %s

[b]EBS Ink-Jet Systeme GmbH[/b]
Alte Ziegelei 19-25
D-51588 Nümbrecht-Elsenroth
DEUTSCHLAND

+49 (0)2293/939-0
Fax +49 (0)2293/939-3

E-Mail: mail@ebs-inkjet.de
WWW: http://www.ebs-inkjet.de

lang.name: msg_resetCounterVF
lang.value: Attention: to perform this operation please ensure that current project is not being printed.\nThis operation affects currently stored values and 'Start value' fields of each counter section.

lang.name: msg_resetTxtFileVF
lang.value: Attention: to perform this operation please ensure that current project is not being printed.\nThis operation affects currently stored values and 'Line start value' field.

lang.name: msg_wrongProjectFilename
lang.value: Project filename cannot contain following characters .,/\\#%*?:{}|

lang.name: msg_communicationError
lang.value:
Communication error
Printer not responding. Please check the system
and try again. If printer is busy due to
fast printing, please stop it and retry.

lang.name: msg_errorJavaScript
lang.value: Critical error!\nJavaScript is disabled.\nPlease turn it on and try again.

lang.name: msg_errorPendrive
lang.value: Critical error!\nPendrive data is missing or is invalid.\nPlease check pendrive and try again.

lang.name: msg_errorBrowserNotSupported
lang.value: Warning!\nThis browser is not supported.\nPlease use Mozilla Firefox instead.

lang.name: msg_projectPriorityTooLow
lang.value: Some project is currently opened for edit on printer LCD.\nYour priority is too low to open project at this moment.

lang.name: msg_projectOpenedFromLCDWnd
lang.value: Some project is currently opened for edit on printer LCD.\nDo You want to force open ?

lang.name: msg_projectClosed
lang.value: Project closed because someone started edition from LCD.

lang.name: msg_improper_poweroff
lang.value: Warning! Improper shutdown detected, which may cause data corruption or device malfunction. Please always follow the shutdown procedure.

lang.name: msg_printerNetworkEmptyFields
lang.value: You must enter printer name and IP address.

lang.name: msg_printerNetworkIPExists
lang.value: Printer with this IP address is already on list.

lang.name: msg_cantDeleteCurrentUser
lang.value: Can`t delete user currently logged in.

lang.name: msg_clearStatistics
lang.value: Are you sure you want clear statistics ?

lang.name: msg_lineDividersMaxReached
lang.value: Maximum number of line dividers was reached.

lang.name: msg_simulationPrintoutTooBig
lang.value:
Printout is too big.

Current printout contains: %s px
Maximum printout can contain: %s px

Please change at least one of the following parameters and try again.

Horizontal distance: %s px
Vertical distance: %s px
Point size: %s px
Workspace width: %s px

lang.name: msg_E01000
lang.value: (E01000) ERROR: Internal memory allocation problem. Printer will not operate properly. Please reopen project, if it does not help, restart printer or reedit the project.

lang.name: msg_E01010
lang.value: (E01010) ERROR: Project width too small. Width has been automatically corrected by printer to the available smallest value.

lang.name: msg_E01011
lang.value: (E01011) ERROR: Project height too small. Height has been automatically corrected by printer to the available smallest value.

lang.name: msg_E01015
lang.value: (E01015) ERROR: Project size too large. Width has been automatically corrected by printer to the maximum value.

lang.name: msg_E1000
lang.value: (E1000) ERROR: Cannot set root permissions to halt the system!

lang.name: msg_E1001
lang.value: (E1001) ERROR: Tempate project does not exist!

lang.name: msg_E1003
lang.value: (E1003) ERROR: Project loading failed - project file does not exist!

lang.name: msg_E1004
lang.value: (E1004) ERROR: Cannot set root permissions to restart the system!

lang.name: msg_E1100
lang.value: (E1100) ERROR: Cannot perform this operation because no project is open!

lang.name: msg_E10100
lang.value: (E10100) ERROR: Cannot load project from selected file! File contains no project information or it is corrupted. Operation aborted!

lang.name: msg_E10101
lang.value: (E10101) ERROR: Cannot load project settings! Using default settings... User intervention required to set proper settings.

lang.name: msg_E10102
lang.value: (E10102) ERROR: Cannot load printing parameters for this project! Using default parameters...User intervention required to set proper parameters (default parameters may be incorrect for current print head).

lang.name: msg_E11010
lang.value: (E11010) ERROR: Variable field \'Text File\': Cannot open the file!

lang.name: msg_E11011
lang.value: (E11011) ERROR: Variable field \'Text File\': Problem with opening/accessing file on a given line!

lang.name: msg_E11020
lang.value: (E11020) ERROR: Variable field \'COM PORT\': Cannot open port!

lang.name: msg_E11021
lang.value: (E11021) ERROR: Variable field \'COM PORT\': Communications port is not open! Communication aborted!

lang.name: msg_E11022
lang.value: (E11022) ERROR: Variable field \'COM PORT\': Read/Write operation failed!

lang.name: msg_E11036
lang.value: (E11036) ERROR: Problem executing barcode engine! Please check the barcode data/settings and correct it if required.

lang.name: msg_D0001
lang.value: Error sending command to printer driver

lang.name: msg_W1111
lang.value: (W1111) WARNING: Skipped printout(s)! Some printouts may be incorrect. Print speed may be too fast for selected project.

lang.name: msg_W1112
lang.value: (W1112) WARNING: Project can not be printed - it was triggered before data was prepared for printing. Skipped printout(s):

lang.name: msg_W2000
lang.value: (W2000) WARNING: The data into print queue has been overflowed, next data will not be collected. Make printout to release the print queue item

lang.name: msg_W2001
lang.value: (W2001) WARNING: Printer has received too much data, without an end character! Redundant data entered into the next item in queue

lang.name: msg_W3000
lang.value: (W3000) WARNING: Waste bootle is overflown! Please empty this bottle. Next purge might damage air-pump. Press OK button after empty bootle.

lang.name: msg_E10000
lang.value: (E10000) ERROR: Cannot load required object data from project file!

lang.name: msg_E10103
lang.value: (E10103) ERROR: Cannot load printing parameters from external file! Using local parameters!

lang.name: msg_E10104
lang.value: (E10104) ERROR: Cannot save project (cannot create directory tree contatining project)

lang.name: msg_E10105
lang.value: (E10105) ERROR: Cannot save project (saving not allowed in a given location)

lang.name: msg_E11023
lang.value: (E11023) ERROR: Variable field 'COM PORT': Fatal error while processing of received data!

lang.name: msg_E11024
lang.value: (E11024) ERROR: Variable field 'COM PORT': Selected COM PORT cannot be open twice (i.e. projects using this com port should not be open for printing and editing at the same time. You can continue but this variable field will not work.)

lang.name: msg_E11030
lang.value: (E11030) ERROR: Barcode data is incorrect (illegal characters detected for current barcode type)! Please correct the data.

lang.name: msg_E11031
lang.value: (E11031) ERROR: Barcode data length is incorrect! Please correct the data.

lang.name: msg_E11035
lang.value: (E11035) ERROR: Cannot load selected barcode description from printer database. It may happen if your project has been created with a newer printer, which handles more barcode types (or printer barcode database is corrupted).

lang.name: msg_E99000
lang.value: (E99000) No ink container registred in the system.

lang.name: msg_E99001
lang.value: (E99001) Incorrect ink container data received from IMS system. Ink container rejected!

lang.name: msg_E99002
lang.value: (E99002) Incorrect ink container parameter(s). Ink container rejected!

lang.name: msg_E99004
lang.value: (E99004) Ink for other print head type - container rejected!

lang.name: msg_W99005
lang.value: (W99005) Different color Ink than previously used - please flush the printer

lang.name: msg_E99005
lang.value: (E99005) Different color Ink than previously used - container rejected!

lang.name: msg_E99006
lang.value: (E99006) Different Ink Type than previously used - container rejected!

lang.name: msg_E99007
lang.value: (E99007) Different Solvent Type than previously used - container rejected!

lang.name: msg_E99020
lang.value: (E99020) Ink container already used with this printer. Ink container rejected!

lang.name: msg_E99021
lang.value: (E99021) Ink container is deactivated (it has been already accepted in another printer). Ink container rejected!

lang.name: msg_E99022
lang.value: (E99022) Ink container registred in the system is utilized and deactivated. Please register new container!

lang.name: msg_E99023
lang.value: (E99023) Ink container is deactivated (it has been consumed). Ink container rejected!

lang.name: msg_E99024
lang.value: (E99024) Ink Container Failure or No Ink Container!

lang.name: msg_E99050
lang.value: (E99050) No printer ID (please follow the ID programming procedure for new devices!)

lang.name: msg_E99051
lang.value: (E99051) No printer ID or incorrect printer ID. Printer cannot be used! Please contact your distributor.

lang.name: msg_I99100
lang.value: (I99100) No ink container registred in the system. Please register your ink to start printing.

lang.name: msg_E99100
lang.value: (E99100) No ink container registred in the system. Please register your ink to start printing.

lang.name: msg_I99110
lang.value: (I99110) Printer was unlocked by codeOperate time remaining: %s

lang.name: msg_I99111
lang.value: (I99111) Code for one-time password successfully accepted.

lang.name: msg_I99112
lang.value: (I99112) Ink type was changed - you can accept / register the new ink

lang.name: msg_W99112
lang.value: (W99112) Ink type was not changed. Please try again

lang.name: msg_E99120
lang.value: (E99120) One Time Password was not generated, Please try again later.

lang.name: msg_E99122
lang.value: (E99122) Exceeded the limit of wrong answers. Printer will switch off

lang.name: msg_W99123
lang.value: (W99123) Code accepted, but option can not be used!

lang.name: msg_W99124
lang.value: (W99124) Code accepted, but wrong option was chosen!

lang.name: msg_E99130
lang.value: (E99130) Internal battery was damaged. Please change them and next restart the Printer! If battery was changed then please restart printer

lang.name: msg_I99130
lang.value: (I99130) Internal battery was damaged. Please change them and next restart the Printer! If battery was changed then please restart printer

lang.name: msg_E99140
lang.value: (E99140) New CPU Board can not be authorized!

lang.name: msg_E99141
lang.value: (E99141) CPU Board is not authorized! Please contact your distributor to authorize!

lang.name: msg_E99142
lang.value: (E99142) Autorization Error: CPU Board can not be authorized! Communication ERROR with CPU Board. Please contact with your distributor.

lang.name: bar_Code_11
lang.value: [b]Char Set:[/b] numeric 0-9 and dash\n[b]Length:[/b] variable\n[b]Description:[/b] Used in the telecommunications industry.

lang.name: bar_Code_25_Industrial
lang.value: [b]Char Set:[/b] numeric 0-9\n[b]Length:[/b] variable\n[b]Description:[/b] Also known as Code 2 of 5 and Code 25 Industrial. Rather old code for industrial use.

lang.name: bar_Code_25_Interleaved
lang.value: [b]Char Set:[/b] numeric 0-9\n[b]Length:[/b] variable\n[b]Description:[/b] Also known as Code 2 of 5 Interleaved. Industrial use.

lang.name: bar_Code_25_IATA
lang.value: [b]Char Set:[/b] numeric 0-9\n[b]Length:[/b] variable\n[b]Description:[/b] A variation of Code 2 of 5 used by the airline industry.

lang.name: bar_Code_25_DataLogic
lang.value: [b]Char Set:[/b] numeric 0-9\n[b]Length:[/b] variable\n[b]Description:[/b] A variation of Code 2 of 5.

lang.name: bar_Code_39
lang.value: [b]Char Set:[/b] A-Z, 0-9, 5 special chars\n[b]Length:[/b] variable\n[b]Description:[/b] Also known as Code 3 of 9. Often used type that is self checking.

lang.name: bar_Code_39_Extended
lang.value: [b]Char Set:[/b] ASCII (127 chars)\n[b]Length:[/b] variable\n[b]Description:[/b] Also known as Code 3 of 9 Extended. Extension of Code 39.

lang.name: bar_EAN
lang.value: [b]Char Set:[/b] numeric 0-9\n[b]Length:[/b] corresponding to selected EAN barcode type\n[b]Description:[/b] The EAN code is primarily used in supermarkets to identify product at the point of sales. It includes standards for EAN-2 and EAN-5 add-on codes, EAN-8 and EAN-13 which encode 2, 5, 7 or 12 digit numbers respectively. Following example will encode an EAN-8 symbol with an EAN-5 add-on: 1234567+12345.

lang.name: bar_GS1_128
lang.value: [b]Char Set:[/b] ASCII\n[b]Length:[/b] variable\n[b]Description:[/b] The EAN/UCC 128 is a special form of the Code 128. It is used for goods and paletts in commerce and industry. There can be coded more than one data field inside one barcode using Application Identifiers (example: [01]2345 where 01 specifies Application Identifier)

lang.name: bar_Codabar
lang.value: [b]Char Set:[/b] 0-9, 6 special characters\n[b]Length:[/b] variable\n[b]Description:[/b] Early standard used by transfusion services. Codabar can encode any length string starting and ending with the letters A-D and containing between these letters the numbers 0-9, dash (-), dollar ($), colon (:), slash (/), full stop (.) or plus (+). Example: A$12+$34C

lang.name: bar_Code_128
lang.value: [b]Char Set:[/b] Extended ASCII\n[b]Length:[/b] variable\n[b]Description:[/b] One of the most widely used 1D barcode symbologies. Modern type of barcode, has highly copmpressed data (example: [1]2345).

lang.name: bar_Leitcode
lang.value: [b]Char Set:[/b] numeric 0-9\n[b]Length:[/b] 14\n[b]Description:[/b] The Leitcode is used by Deutschen Post/DHL. Last digit is calculated automatically (control value) - only 13 characters should be specified.

lang.name: bar_Identcode
lang.value: [b]Char Set:[/b] numeric 0-9\n[b]Length:[/b] 12\n[b]Description:[/b] The Identcode is used by Deutschen Post/DHL. Last digit is calculated automatically (control value) - only 11 characters should be specified.

lang.name: bar_Code_16k
lang.value: [b]Char Set:[/b] ASCII\n[b]Length:[/b] variable\n[b]Description:[/b] Stacked symbology based on Code 128.

lang.name: bar_Code_93
lang.value: [b]Char Set:[/b] A-Z, 0-9, 5 special chars\n[b]Length:[/b] variable\n[b]Description:[/b] Same characterset as Code 39 but more compacted code that requires less space.

lang.name: bar_GS1_DataBar-14
lang.value: [b]Char Set:[/b] numeric 0-9\n[b]Length:[/b] 14\n[b]Description:[/b] New GTIN encoding system. Last digit is calculated automatically (control value) - only (up to) 13 characters should be specified.

lang.name: bar_GS1_DataBar_Limited
lang.value: [b]Char Set:[/b] numeric 0-9\n[b]Length:[/b] 13\n[b]Description:[/b] New GTIN encoding system.

lang.name: bar_GS1_DataBar_Expanded
lang.value: [b]Char Set:[/b] numeric 0-9\n[b]Length:[/b] variable\n[b]Description:[/b] A replacement for GS1-128. Also known as RSS Expanded this is a variable length symbology capable of encoding data from a number of AIs in a single symbol. AIs should be encased in [square brackets] in the input data. Example: [01]1236[3202]0125[15]9874

lang.name: bar_Telepen_Alpha
lang.value: [b]Char Set:[/b] ASCII\n[b]Length:[/b] variable\n[b]Description:[/b] General encoding scheme. Often used in libraries.

lang.name: bar_UPC-A
lang.value: [b]Char Set:[/b] numeric 0-9\n[b]Length:[/b] 12\n[b]Description:[/b] The UPC A code is the standard version of the UPC code and has 12 digits. It is also called UPC 12 and is very similar to the EAN code. Last digit is calculated automatically (control value) - only 11 characters should be specified.

lang.name: bar_UPC-E
lang.value: [b]Char Set:[/b] numeric 0-9\n[b]Length:[/b] 8\n[b]Description:[/b] This is the short version of UPC-A for extremly small products.Last digit is calculated automatically (control value) - only 7 characters should be specified.

lang.name: bar_PostNet
lang.value: [b]Char Set:[/b] numeric 0-9\n[b]Length:[/b] variable\n[b]Description:[/b] This code is used to improve the speed of sorting and delivering of mail.

lang.name: bar_MSI_Plessey
lang.value: [b]Char Set:[/b] numeric 0-9\n[b]Length:[/b] variable\n[b]Description:[/b] An old system once common in British industry.

lang.name: bar_Pharmacode_One-Track
lang.value: [b]Char Set:[/b] numeric 0-9\n[b]Length:[/b] -\n[b]Description:[/b] Pharmacode, also known as Pharmaceutical Binary Code, is a barcode standard, used in the pharmaceutical industry as a packing control system.

lang.name: bar_Pharmacode_Two-Track
lang.value: [b]Char Set:[/b] numeric 0-9\n[b]Length:[/b] -\n[b]Description:[/b] Pharmacode (a two-track variation), also known as Pharmaceutical Binary Code, is a barcode standard, used in the pharmaceutical industry as a packing control system.

lang.name: bar_PZN
lang.value: [b]Char Set:[/b] numeric 0-9\n[b]Length:[/b] 7\n[b]Description:[/b] Pharmazentralnummer für medicine. Special form of Code 39.

lang.name: bar_PDF417
lang.value: [b]Char Set:[/b] Extended ASCII\n[b]Length:[/b] variable\n[b]Description:[/b] 2D barcode for encoding mass text or data in only one code. Popular in the courier industry.

lang.name: bar_PDF417_Truncated
lang.value: [b]Char Set:[/b] Extended ASCII\n[b]Length:[/b] variable\n[b]Description:[/b] 2D barcode for encoding mass text or data in only one code. Popular in the courier industry.

lang.name: bar_QR_Code
lang.value: [b]Char Set:[/b] Extended ASCII\n[b]Length:[/b] variable\n[b]Description:[/b] Highly compact code popular with camera-phone users.

lang.name: bar_Australia_Post_4-State
lang.value: [b]Char Set:[/b] A-Z, 0-9\n[b]Length:[/b] variable\n[b]Description:[/b] For identification of mail items in Australia.

lang.name: bar_Royal_Mail_4-State
lang.value: [b]Char Set:[/b] A-Z, 0-9\n[b]Length:[/b] variable\n[b]Description:[/b] The Royal Mail 4 State Customer Code (RM4SCC) was created for automated mail sorting processes.

lang.name: bar_DataMatrix
lang.value: [b]Char Set:[/b] ASCII\n[b]Length:[/b] variable\n[b]Description:[/b] 2D barcode for encoding mass text or data in only one code.

lang.name: bar_MicroPDF417
lang.value: [b]Char Set:[/b] Extended ASCII\n[b]Length:[/b] variable\n[b]Description:[/b] Reduced Space version of PDF417.

lang.name: w_title_edit_choice
lang.value: What do you want to edit?

lang.name: wtitle_cDataTimeDialog
lang.value: Por favor insira a hora e data

lang.name: wtitle_LowBatteryAlert
lang.value: Aviso! Verifique o nível de carga da bateria!

lang.name: wtitle_PrintHeadMismatch
lang.value: Warning! Project and printer head mismatch!

lang.name: lbl_must_edit_counter
lang.value: Edit counter before printing is started

lang.name: msg_deleteRecoveryFile
lang.value: NOTE! Confirmation of selection will delete the backup!

lang.name: msg_RecoveryFileSelection
lang.value: Detected rescue version of project. \nPlease select which version do you want to edit. Original project or restored version ?

lang.name: msg_ConfirmRecoveryRemoval
lang.value: Do you want to delete recovery file ?

lang.name: msg_DelRecoveryWithoutRescue
lang.value: Do you want continue and REMOVE recovery file without restoring it? This decision can not be undone !
